creator: paradyse@gmail.com
text:
Kernel panic on AR7161 platform with AR9220 WIFI card while AH_DEBUG used. 

After some debug and tracing, found that it is caused by
ath_hal_reg_read(_ah, _reg). I replaced it with inline version and it
just works fine. But it is not a proper fix. 

Index: ah_osdep.h
===================================================================
--- ah_osdep.h	(revision 225165)
+++ ah_osdep.h	(working copy)
@@ -91,8 +91,15 @@
  * defined below.
  */
 #if defined(AH_DEBUG) || defined(AH_REGOPS_FUNC) || defined(AH_DEBUG_ALQ)
+
 #define	OS_REG_WRITE(_ah, _reg, _val)	ath_hal_reg_write(_ah, _reg, _val)
-#define	OS_REG_READ(_ah, _reg)		ath_hal_reg_read(_ah, _reg)
+//#define	OS_REG_READ(_ah, _reg)		ath_hal_reg_read(_ah, _reg)
+#define OS_REG_READ(_ah, _reg)						\
+	(OS_REG_UNSWAPPED(_reg) ?					\
+		bus_space_read_4((bus_space_tag_t)(_ah)->ah_st,		\
+		    (bus_space_handle_t)(_ah)->ah_sh, (_reg)) :		\
+		bus_space_read_stream_4((bus_space_tag_t)(_ah)->ah_st,	\
+		    (bus_space_handle_t)(_ah)->ah_sh, (_reg)))
 
 extern	void ath_hal_reg_write(struct ath_hal *ah, u_int reg, u_int32_t val);
 extern	u_int32_t ath_hal_reg_read(struct ath_hal *ah, u_int reg);

How-To-Repeat: Atheros AR7161 BIG ENDIAN platform  + AR9220 WIFI CARD + KERNEL enable "AH_DEBUG"
---
# Wireless NIC cards
options         IEEE80211_DEBUG
#options                IEEE80211_SUPPORT_MESH
options         IEEE80211_SUPPORT_TDMA
device          wlan            # 802.11 support
device          wlan_wep        # 802.11 WEP support
device          wlan_ccmp       # 802.11 CCMP support
device          wlan_tkip       # 802.11 TKIP support

device          ath             # Atheros NIC's
device          ath_pci         # Atheros pci/cardbus glue
options         ATH_DEBUG
device          ath_hal
options AH_DEBUG
option          AH_SUPPORT_AR5416
option          AH_RXCFG_SDMAMW_4BYTES  # See NOTES for details of this WAR
device          ath_rate_sample
--------------
